basic_details.job_title: Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura High Court has published the Junior Grade Translator Notification 2026 on 13 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Junior Grade Translator positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 40 years (for UR candidates) and 18 to 45 years (for SC/ST candidates) and holding a Master's Degree in any official language of Tripura with proficiency in English or a Master's Degree in English with proficiency in any official language of Tripura are eligible to apply online at thc.tripura.gov.in. The application process will be active from 13 May 2026 to 13 June 2026, and candidates ca

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years (for UR candidates) Maximum Age: 45 years (for SC/ST candidates)

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree in any official language of Tripura with proficiency in English OR Masters Degree in English with proficiency in any official language of Tripura. Proficiency in computer use is necessary. Law Graduate will be given due weightage.
qualification.details: Masters Degree from a recognized University in any official language of the State of Tripura with proficiency in English language Or, A Masters Degree in English from a recognized University with proficiency in any official language of the State of Tripura. Proficiency in the use of computer is necessary.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.5700-24000/- with Grade Pay Rs.4200/- (Revised to Level-10)
salary_details.details: Pay Band-2, Rs.5700-24000/- with Grade Pay Rs.4200/- (Revised to Level-10)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Tripura High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator recruitment is 13 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Grade Translator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters Degree in any official language of Tripura with English proficiency, or a Masters Degree in English with proficiency in any official language of Tripura. Computer proficiency is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years. The maximum age is 40 years for general candidates and 45 years for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Grade Translator position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Junior Grade Translator post in the Tripura High Court.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UR category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the UR category is Rs. 600/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SC/ST category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST category is Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, which will be of 3 hours duration, followed by a Viva Voce (Interview).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Junior Grade Translator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in Pay Band-2, Rs.5700-24000/- with Grade Pay Rs.4200/-, which is revised to Level-10 of the Tripura State Pay Matrix, 2018.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, candidates must submit their applications strictly through the Online Application Portal only. Hard copy applications will not be entertained.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official website of Tripura High Court.
